chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Revision Application No.161 of 2020 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz ul Hassan Shah Applicant:- The State/Anti-Narcotics Force through Mr. Habib Ahmed, Special Prosecutor ANF. Respondent:- Waheed Alam through Mr. Baber Hameed, Advocate. Date of hearing:- 20.01.2026 =============== MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Anti-Narcotics Force has impugned two orders dated 22.07.2020 and 27.04.2020 whereby the trial Court has restored possession of car Honda Civic Model 2006 from which allegedly 20 Kgs velium diazepam tablets was recovered, allegedly an offence under CNS Act, 1997; and returned the passport to applicant along with de-blocking his CNIC. Admittedly, these orders were passed in the year 2020. Much water has passed since, and there is no complaint that the respondent has abused the process of law meanwhile by not producing either the vehicle in the trial or trying to tamper with the evidence or escaping from the course of the trial. 2. Further it has been reported that in the trial some of the witnesses have been examined. Therefore, at this juncture, after the five years, we do not find it fit to upset the orders and given any decision in favour of either side. More so when the said orders are tentative in nature. 3. In view of above circumstances, we dismiss this revision application but direct the trial Court to expedite the process of the trial and decide the fate of two issues in hand permanently through the judgment in accordance with law. The Cr. Revision Application is accordingly disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Hanif JUDGE
